subject: [PATCH 7/9] sched/core_sched: defer WARN console output under rq->lock

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch modifies the Linux kernel to defer the output of certain warning messages under rq->lock, preventing potential deadlocks caused by synchronous console output. The WARN*() calls are replaced with SCHED_WARN*() variants that use irq_work for deferred console output. This change is intended to prevent deadlocks when warnings fire on legacy or boot consoles.
